subject: SaaS Metrics Dashboard - Weekly Update
body:
Leadership Team,

Weekly SaaS metrics for the week ending March 14, 2026:

Bookings:
- New ACV booked: $380K (4 deals)
- Expansion ACV: $120K (7 upsells)
- Churned ACV: $45K (1 logo lost)
- Net new ACV: $455K

Pipeline:
- Total qualified pipeline: $8.2M
- Pipeline created this week: $1.1M
- Pipeline coverage ratio: 3.8x (target: 3.0x)
- Weighted pipeline: $2.9M

Product Usage:
- DAU: 12,400 (up 3% WoW)
- WAU: 28,900 (up 2% WoW)
- Feature adoption (AI assistant): 34% of active users
- API calls: 45M this week (up 8%)

Customer Health:
- Green: 78% of ARR
- Yellow: 16% of ARR
- Red: 6% of ARR (3 accounts, $2.9M ARR at risk)

Action Item: The three red accounts need executive engagement this week. Account plans attached.
